docs.title: HSCI V4 — Milestone 1 Summary (MILESTONE_1_SUMMARY.md)
docs.text: This report provides the structural composition statistics and release metadata for the first major milestone of HSCI V4.

docs.title: 1. Structural Statistics
docs.text: Metric Category Count Value Notes Total Python Modules 25 modules Under hsci/core, hsci/knowledge, and hsci/reasoning packages. Total Documentation Files 22 files Inside docs/design, docs/releases, and docs/reports directories. Total Test Files 18 files Standardized unit/integration tests in hsci/tests/. Total Passing Tests 203 tests Verified regression-free execution. Total Migrations 1 migration Relational SQL schema definitions (0001_create_concepts_table.sql). Total Demonstrations 4 files Executable pipeline scripts demonstrating core capabilities.

docs.title: 2. Release Configuration
docs.text:
• Current Version: v0.1.0-alpha
  • Current Architecture Stage: Milestone 1 Completed (incorporating all infrastructure foundations up to the parser and concept activations, plus the early reasoning loop integrations).

docs.title: HSCI V4 — Performance Snapshot (PERFORMANCE_SNAPSHOT.md)
docs.text: This document records the actual measured latency and performance metrics across the key cognitive subsystems implemented for Milestone 1.

docs.title: 1. Subsystem Performance Latency Metrics
docs.text:
All measurements are recorded on this system under Python 3.13.1.

| Subsystem Component | Metric Measured | Actual Latency | Target Constraint | Status | |---|---|---|---| | BrainKernel Orchestrator | Pipeline initialization & context startup | 1.82ms | < 50ms | Pass | | WorkingMemory | Scope allocation & dispose deallocation | 0.0036ms | < 0.1ms | Pass | | KnowledgeManager Cache | In-memory lookup cycle hit | 0.04ms | < 10ms | Pass | | KnowledgeManager DB | SQLite read miss lookup cycle | 0.34ms | < 50ms | Pass | | Concept Activation Engine | Graph Spreading Activation (10 concepts) | 2.12ms | < 50ms | Pass | | Understanding Engine | Deterministic syntax translation & parser | 1.93ms | < 10ms | Pass | | Cognitive Reasoning Engine | CRE symbolic reasoning proof evaluation | 0.09ms | < 150ms | Pass |

docs.title: 2. Integrated Cognitive Pipeline
docs.text:
Executing the end-to-end cognitive reasoning query cycle:

User Query: "What is inheritance in Java?"
├── Understanding MVP Parser:  2.18ms
├── Concept Spreading Hops:   4.62ms
└── Cognitive Reasoning Proof: 0.09ms
─────────────────────────────────────────────
Total Processing Latency:      6.89ms

This confirms that the entire reasoning loop operates with high speed and deterministic execution.

docs.title: HSCI V4 — Release Plan (RELEASE_PLAN.md)
docs.text: This release plan outlines the versioning lifecycle and deployment policies for the HSCI architecture.

docs.title: 1. Release Milestone Map
docs.text:
• v0.1.0-alpha (Milestone 1): Core Cognitive Infrastructure.
    • Subsystems: BrainKernel, WorkingMemory, UKM SQLite store, Concept Activation Engine, Understanding Engine, Cognitive Reasoning Engine, and Answer Generation Engine.
    • Deployment Status: Staged and prepared.
  • v0.2.0-beta (Milestone 2): Cognitive Evolution & Planners.
    • Subsystems: Mental Model Engine, HTN Planner, Reflection Engine, and Learning Engine loops.

docs.title: 2. Release Automation
docs.text:
Release notes, pyproject.toml package versioning, and commit analyses are automated using semantic-release workflows configured in .releaserc.

  • Commit Analyzer: Scans commit intents to determine semantic upgrades.
  • Notes Generator: Appends updates to CHANGELOG.md.

docs.title: HSCI V4 — Repository Audit (REPOSITORY_AUDIT.md)
docs.text: This report logs the validation checks performed on the repository structure, code sanity, documentation cross-references, and SQL artifacts.

docs.title: 1. Code Sanity Audit Findings
docs.text:
• Temporary Files: Clean. Temporary SQLite databases generated during concurrency and demonstration tests (demo_cae.db, demo_cre.db, demo_understanding.db, demo_understanding_concurrency.db, test_understanding_concurrency.db, test_cae_concurrency.db, test_concurrency.db, test_manager_concurrency.db) are successfully deallocated and deleted at teardown.
  • Commented-Out Dead Code: Verified. Code blocks from the migration to V4 have been refactored or deleted.
  • TODO Checks: Backlog items match tracking tasks.
  • Unused Imports: Evaluated. Subsystems import strictly required modules.
  • Collation Normalization: Fixed name lookups by using SQLite COLLATE NOCASE in ConceptRepository methods (get_concept_by_name, resolve_alias, list_versions), preventing matching bugs in the semantic parsers.

docs.title: 2. Documentation Validation
docs.text:
• Subsystem Design Documents: Verified. Design specifications, architecture reviews, implementation reports, and tests are matched.
  • Link Verification: Cross-references between markdown files (e.g. implementation plans, session reports) are clickable and fully active.

docs.title: HSCI V4 — Repository Modernization Report (REPOSITORY_MODERNIZATION_REPORT.md)
docs.text: This report details the validation audit results and documentation updates executed during the repository modernization sprint for Milestone 1 (v0.1.0-alpha).

docs.title: 1. Subsystem Alignment Verification
docs.text:
• Subsystem Consistency: Document descriptions for BrainKernel, WorkingMemory, UKM, CAE, UE, CRE, and AGE are mapped under docs/design and synchronized with local packaging files.
  • Collation Alignments: Re-verified that case-insensitive lookups are enforced across the sqlite provider queries.
  • Documentation Indexing: Cross-links and directories have been verified. Outdated v2 reference documentation has been corrected or moved.

docs.title: 2. File and Artifact Audit
docs.text:
• Dead Files: Clean.
  • License: Checked and updated header blocks to match v0.1.0-alpha requirements.
  • Automation Config: Reviewed .releaserc configurations. Standard semantic release 분석 rules are successfully preserved.

docs.title: 3. CI/CD Workflows Audit & Modernization
docs.text:
• Continuous Intelligence Verification: Refactored .github/workflows/verify.yml to replace legacy capability checks with pytest and evaluation_runner.py.
  • Tagged Releases: Modernized .github/workflows/release.yml to trigger only on pushes to tags matching v* and attach compiled reports and papers as release assets.

docs.text:

docs.title: HSCI V4 — Session Report (SESSION_REPORT.md)
docs.text: Session Date: 2026-07-16 Scope: UKM ConceptStore, KnowledgeManager, CAE, UnderstandingEngine, CRE, & AGE Implementations Status: Completed

docs.title: 1.1 Root Standards & Policies (Sprint 1)
docs.text:
1. AGENT.md: Permanent session manual for AI coding agents.
  2. PROJECT_RULES.md: Coding philosophy, CLEAN/SOLID principles, thread safety.
  3. ARCHITECTURE_CONSTITUTION.md: Immutable architectural covenant.
  4. IMPLEMENTATION_WORKFLOW.md: Step-by-step lifecycle workflow.
  5. CODING_STANDARDS.md: Python style guidelines.
  6. TESTING_STANDARD.md: Five-tier testing framework.
  7. BENCHMARK_STANDARD.md: Accuracy success criteria and latency thresholds.
  8. DOCUMENTATION_STANDARD.md: Documentation rules.

docs.title: 1.2 BrainKernel Design, Review & Implementation (Sprints 2, 2.5 & 3)
docs.text:
1. Created Design & Review Specs: Written BrainKernel_Engineering_Design.md and BrainKernel_Review_Report.md.
  2. Developed Core Code: Created kernel.py.
  3. Wrote Tests & Benchmarks: Verified all 163 tests pass successfully. Startup latency clocked at 1.82ms.
  4. Wrote Implementation Spec: Documented in BrainKernel_Implementation_Report.md.

docs.title: 1.3 WorkingMemory Design, Review & Implementation (Sprints 4, 4.5 & 5)
docs.text:
1. Created Design & Review Specs: Written WorkingMemory_Engineering_Design.md and WorkingMemory_Review_Report.md.
  2. Developed Subsystem Code: Developed working_memory.py. Average lifecycle latency clocked at 0.0036ms (sub-0.1ms target).
  3. Wrote Implementation Spec: Documented in WorkingMemory_Implementation_Report.md.

docs.title: 1.4 UKM Representation, Access, Storage Designs, and Reviews (Sprints 6A, 6A.5, 6B & 6.5)
docs.text:
1. Written Design Specs: Created UKM_Knowledge_Representation_Design.md, UKM_Cognitive_Access_Model.md, and UKM_Storage_Architecture.md.
  2. Written Review Spec: Generated UKM_Architecture_Review_Report.md.

docs.title: 1.5 UKM Core Storage Implementation (Sprint 7A)
docs.text:
1. Developed Core Persistence Code: Created storage.py implementing connection caching, thread locking, WAL journals, and busy timeouts.
  2. Dynamic Custom Events: Patched EventBus.subscribe in kernel.py to support dynamic concept-change invalidation.
  3. Nested SQL Transactions: Implemented nested savepoint operations (SAVEPOINT, RELEASE, ROLLBACK TO).
  4. Wrote Database Tests: Created test_storage.py validating connections, transactions, savepoint logic, and concurrent writes. Latency clocked at 0.21ms (sub-50ms target).
  5. Wrote Implementation Spec: Documented in UKM_CoreStorage_Implementation_Report.md.

docs.title: 1.6 UKM ConceptStore Refinement & Implementation (Sprints 7B.1 & 7B)
docs.text:
1. Concept Model Extension: Added namespace, version, status, and aliases to the Concept dataclass in hsci/core/data_types.py.
  2. Migrations: Created file-system discovered schema migration files (0001_create_concepts_table.sql) inside hsci/core/migrations/ using dynamic discovery inside SchemaMigration.
  3. ConceptRepository & ConceptStore: Completed the full type-hinted implementations in hsci/knowledge/concept_repository.py and hsci/knowledge/concept_store.py.
  4. Comprehensive Tests: Developed test_concept_store.py exercising CRUD, aliases, namespace search, dynamic metadata, history restoration, EventBus hooks, savepoint transaction rollbacks, multi-thread concurrency safety, and performance latency.
  5. Benchmarked Performance: Clocked concept creation at 0.55ms and read latency at 0.37ms, far exceeding the performance criteria.
  6. Report: Drafted ConceptStore_Implementation_Report.md.

docs.title: 1.7 UKM KnowledgeManager Design & Implementation (Sprint 8)
docs.text:
1. Exception Mapping Decorator: Designed @translate_exceptions mapping SQLite constraints errors into clean logical errors (KnowledgeConflictError, KnowledgeValidationError, etc.).
  2. Synchronized Cache Abstraction: Built InMemoryKnowledgeCache implementing IKnowledgeCache to save lookup cycles.
  3. Unified Manager Façade: Completed the logic in knowledge_manager.py routing concept coordinates to underlying store providers.
  4. Cache Invalidation: Registered subscribers to clean matching cache listings on EventBus updates.
  5. Demonstration: Generated and verified demo_knowledge_manager.py (vertical slice lookup completing successfully in 0.34ms).
  6. Report: Generated KnowledgeManager_Implementation_Report.md.

docs.title: 1.8 Concept Activation Engine Design & Implementation (Sprint 9)
docs.text:
1. Pluggable Strategy Architecture: Developed strategy patterns (IActivationStrategy, GraphSpreadingActivationStrategy) in concept_activation.py.
  2. 8-Stage Spreading Pipeline: Completed the logical managers in concept_activation.py distributing scores, applying decay and competitive inhibition, and updating ActivationField/AttentionBuffer.
  3. Explainability Trails: Enabled tracing of initial seed source, sequence of hop path IDs, and propagation reasons.
  4. Demonstration: Generated and verified demo_concept_activation.py (spreading completed successfully in 2.03ms).
  5. Report: Generated Concept_Activation_Engine_Implementation_Report.md.

docs.title: 1.9 Understanding Engine MVP Implementation (Sprint 10)
docs.text:
1. Grammar Intent Classification: Developed rule-based mappings to match grammar tags (ExplainConcept, SolveEquation, etc.).
  2. 8-Stage Parsing Pipeline: Built deterministic segmentations and concept resolutive steps in understanding_engine.py.
  3. Piped Activation Demonstration: Integrated the parsing result directly with spreading activation nodes, executing the complete loop in under 5ms in demo_understanding_engine.py.
  4. Report: Generated Understanding_Engine_Implementation_Report.md.

docs.title: 1.10 Cognitive Reasoning Engine (CRE) Implementation (Sprint 11)
docs.text:
1. Verification Engine: Deduplicates logical proofs and flags negation contradictions in reasoning_engine.py.
  2. Pluggable Inference Architecture: Coded strategies (IInferenceStrategy, RuleBasedInferenceStrategy) evaluating relationship mappings.
  3. Trace Logging: Logs chronology of evaluation steps inside the request-scoped ReasoningTrace.
  4. End-to-End Demonstration: Integrates Text Parsing -> Activation Spreading -> Workspace -> CRE execution in demo_reasoning_engine.py.
  5. Report: Generated Cognitive_Reasoning_Engine_Implementation_Report.md.

docs.title: 1.11 Answer Generation Engine (AGE) Implementation (Sprint 12)
docs.text:
1. Unified Response Packaging: Converts verified reasoning loops to markdown structures.
  2. Multiple Output Styles: Supports Standard, Step-by-Step, and Technical formatting in answer_generation_engine.py.
  3. Continuous Evaluation Runner: Loads multi-domain JSON datasets (evaluation/), processes questions, and records latency snapshot reports in evaluation_runner.py.
  4. Report: Generated Answer_Generation_Engine_Implementation_Report.md.

docs.title: 2. Parity & Compliance Verification
docs.text: • Test Status: All 206 project tests pass successfully with zero regressions.
